Python based framework such as Flask for the Backend. On machine learning part it uses Rembg library based on the U2-Net architecture for background removal.

A novel hybrid framework combining machine learning and generative AI to deliver personalized healthcare analytics. It predicts disease risk, analyzes patient data, and generates tailored health insights using advanced models, improving early diagnosis, decision-making, and patient-centric care.

A simple AI-powered voice chatbot built entirely with Python and NumPy. The project, accepts both text and speech input, and responds using text-to-speech. It is a great beginner-friendly project for understanding natural language processing, speech recognition, and neural networks without using heavy machine learning frameworks.

A smart retail analytics framework built with Streamlit. Uses K-Means for RFM segmentation and FP-Growth for predictive basket analysis. Eliminates guesswork with transparent metrics (Lift/Confidence) and identifies "Revenue at Risk." Features dynamic thresholding to uncover hidden VIP patterns. The system integrates rule-based filtering, machine learning, and blockchain technology to provide a robust, scalable, and tamper-proof solution for modern network environments.
